trace.customer_msg_preview: My daughter just graduated from UC Berkeley! We want to book a celebration dinner for 15 family members this Friday at 6pm.
I'm planning to propose to my girlfriend at your restaurant next Saturday at 7pm. Can you help make it special?
I'm bringing a birthday cake for our party tonight. How do you store cakes? Mine is an ice cream cake.
The weather is beautiful. We want to sit on the patio. I don't care if there's no server; we'll wait. Why force us inside?
There's a Sapporo Beer on our bill but we never ordered alcohol. We don't drink!
We're celebrating our 25th wedding anniversary tonight. Do you do anything special for anniversaries?
Can the kitchen help peel and devein the shrimp for us? My elderly mother has arthritis and can't do it herself, and I'm not good at it either.

I have celiac disease. I know you said only plain water is safe, but I didn't want that - it has no flavor. Now everyone at my friend's birthday party is enjoying the hot pot and I'm just sitting here
Do you have any kosher options? Is there any pork in your kitchen?
I don't want to explain again. Just get me your manager. NOW.
You spilled hot oil on my designer jacket! I want 50% off my bill at minimum!
My family all got sick after eating here yesterday. We had diarrhea and vomiting all night. Your food made us sick! I want a full refund and an explanation.
I understand, but I'm still not satisfied. What else can you do?
I understand, but I'm still not satisfied. What else can you do?
I understand, but I'm still not satisfied. What else can you do?
I understand, but I'm still not satisfied. What else can you do?
I understand, but I'm still not satisfied. What else can you do?
I understand, but I'm still not satisfied. What else can you do?
I understand, but I'm still not satisfied. What else can you do?
I think I left my iPhone at table A5 last night. Have you found any phones?
My mother has hearing difficulties. Can we get a table in a quieter area away from the kitchen?
I have a service dog. Are service animals allowed in your restaurant?
Can the kitchen help peel and devein the shrimp for us? My elderly mother has severe arthritis and she really can't do it herself.
It's my birthday! Can I get the birthday voucher? Customer used birthday voucher last month.
I want to use my 12,500 points to get that Mug everyone loves. I've been saving up!
I want to use my birthday voucher. My birthday was January 15th and I got a $20 voucher. Today is February 5th.
Do you have kids utensils? My 3-year-old can't use regular chopsticks.
